'''鈭歮-w-ng-v''' ('''kamawngevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immix|immix]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-w-ng-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immix|immix]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-w-ng-v
|-
! Lemma
| kamawngevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimawngevoko|thimawngevoko]] || [[word:jimawngevoko|jimawngevoko]] || [[word:shimawngevoko|shimawngevoko]] || [[word:kimawngevoko|kimawngevoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
